Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$enc = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8
\\$f = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('C:\\Users\\User\\PMGRD Pagina\\js\\app.js', \\$enc\)
\\$lines = \\$f -split '\\r?\\n'
Write-Output \('Total lines: ' + \\$lines.Count\)
for \(\\$i = \(\\$lines.Count - 15\); \\$i -lt \\$lines.Count; \\$i++\) {
  Write-Output \('{0,4}: {1}' -f \(\\$i+1\), \\$lines[\\$i]\)
}
")
